subject: fix(mobile): remove backdrop so canvas stays interactive with sheet open
body:
Removed the blocking backdrop overlay from BottomSheet. Canvas is now
visible and tappable above the sheet — cell selection and page swipe
work without closing the sheet first. Follows the Maps/Uber/Spotify
bottom sheet pattern where the sheet is non-blocking.

Close the sheet by dragging it down or tapping the active MobileNav tab.
Added a stronger top shadow for visual separation without a backdrop.

Tags: mobile, ui, ux, bottom-sheet
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
title: remove backdrop so canvas stays interactive with sheet open
